conflict: Shame invites self-mythologizing; Marisol wants to convert failure into poetic posture instead of accountability.
consequence: She takes a new day-one chip at a meeting and loses a paid youth workshop slot she missed during the relapse day.
must_land_beats: Physical aftermath inventory: dehydration, missed calls, and financial penalty.
Luis insists that narrative brilliance is irrelevant without honest amends.
Marisol tells the room she drank yesterday.
Loss of teaching slot introduces concrete economic cost.
objective: Stabilize after relapse and account for damage already done.
